title: Christmas
text: vintage decor styled ornaments, candlelight, dark greenery; not red and green farmhouse; publish Pinterest 6 to 8 weeks ahead, video 3 to 6 weeks ahead

title: Fall
text: gothic, rich burgundy, burnished brass, dried botanicals, layered textiles

title: Spring
text: botanical prints, muted dusty rose, brass vessels, vintage garden elements

title: Seasonal calendar
text: January organize, February cozy, March to April outdoor, summer retreat, fall layered coziness, November to December holiday

title: Seasonal timing windows (machine-readable)
